records.ety: [L. hieraticus, Gr. "ieratiko`s; akin to "iero`s sacred: cf. F. hiratique.]

defs: Consecrated to sacred uses; sacerdotal; pertaining to priests.
quotes: It was a false notion of the Greeks that of the three kinds of writing used by the Egyptians, two -- for that reason called hieroglyphic and hieratic -- were employed only for sacred, while the third, the demotic, was employed for secular, purposes. No such distinction is discoverable on the more ancient Egyptian monuments; bur we retain the old names founded on misapprehension.
